Feng Ren ŚįĀšĽĀ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Feng Ren (ŚįĀšĽĀ). Around 215, Cao Cao told Feng of his confidence in the loyalty of Jiang Ji. Feng Ren was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
